LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.description: A crude, homemade bolt-action rifle assembled from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While slow to fire and lacking in power compared to proper rifles, it is easy to produce and maintain, making it a common weapon among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.label: pipe bolt-action
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_BoltAction.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.description: A crude, homemade pistol cobbled together from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While unreliable and lacking in stopping power, it is easy to craft and maintain, making it a common sidearm among the most desperate wastelanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.label: pipe pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.description: A crude, homemade revolver assembled from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While unreliable and slow to reload, it is easy to craft and maintain, making it a common sidearm among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.label: pipe revolver
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Revolver.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.description: A crude, homemade semi-automatic rifle assembled from scavenged pipes and scrap metal. While unreliable and inaccurate, it offers decent firepower for its simple construction, making it popular among raiders and settlers alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.label: pipe rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.description: A crude, single-shot shotgun cobbled together from pipes and scrap. Devastating at close range but slow to reload, it's a favorite among desperate wastelanders who need stopping power on a budget.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.label: pipe shotgun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Shotgun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.description: A crude, long-barreled pipe rifle fitted with a makeshift scope. While nowhere near as accurate as a proper sniper rifle, it offers improved range for wastelanders who can't afford better equipment.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.label: pipe sniper rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pipe_Sniper.tools.1.label: barrel
